pattern: Composition API with setup script
implementation: <script setup> import { ref computed } from 'vue'; const isDark = ref(false); const bgColor = computed(() => isDark.value ? '#000000' : '#fbfbfd'); </script>
anti_pattern: Options API with data()/methods() for new components
notes: setup script syntax is terser and matches Apple's preference for clean declarative code

pattern: CSS custom properties for Apple design tokens
implementation: :root { --space-xs: 4px; --space-sm: 8px; --space-md: 16px; --space-lg: 24px; --space-xl: 32px; --space-2xl: 48px; --color-text-primary: #1d1d1f; --color-bg: #fbfbfd; }
anti_pattern: Hardcoded pixel values scattered across component styles
notes: Single source of truth for spacing and color tokens in :root

pattern: v-bind in CSS for dynamic Apple color tokens
implementation: <script setup> const accentColor = ref('#2997ff'); </script> <style> .btn { background: v-bind(accentColor); } </style>
anti_pattern: Inline style bindings that bypass Vue's reactivity for dynamic tokens
notes: v-bind in style blocks keeps dynamic tokens reactive without extra class juggling

pattern: Transition component with spring-like cubic-bezier
implementation: content
anti_pattern: CSS ease-in-out transitions or no transition on modal/panel reveals
notes: Apple-matched spring-like cubic-bezier curves for enter/leave transitions

pattern: Teleport for modal sheets and popovers
implementation: {{ content }}
anti_pattern: Rendering modals inline inside deeply nested component trees
notes: Teleport ensures sheet overlays render at body level avoiding z-index and overflow issues

pattern: defineProps for typed component API
implementation: const props = defineProps<{ title: string; subtitle?: string; size?: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'; }>(); const emit = defineEmits<{ (e: 'close'): void; (e: 'confirm', value: string): void; }>();
anti_pattern: Untyped props with no defaults matching Apple's precise component APIs
notes: TypeScript-typed props and emits make component contracts explicit and refactor-safe

pattern: Pinia store for Apple theme state
implementation: import { defineStore } from 'pinia'; export const useThemeStore = defineStore('theme' () => { const isDark = ref(false); const accentColor = ref('#2997ff'); function toggleDark() { isDark.value = !isDark.value; } return { isDark accentColor toggleDark }; });
anti_pattern: Prop-drilling theme values through component trees
notes: Pinia gives a single reactive source for dark mode and accent color accessible anywhere

pattern: useColorMode composable for system theme detection
implementation: import { usePreferredColorScheme } from '@vueuse/core'; const colorScheme = usePreferredColorScheme(); watchEffect(() => { document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme' colorScheme.value); });
anti_pattern: Polling document.documentElement for theme or JS-only toggle
notes: VueUse usePreferredColorScheme reacts to OS-level dark mode changes without polling

pattern: -apple-system font stack in global styles
implementation: body { font-family: -apple-system BlinkMacSystemFont 'Inter' 'Segoe UI' system-ui sans-serif; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale; }
anti_pattern: font-family: Arial or Helvetica in component scoped styles
notes: SF Pro renders on Apple devices; Inter on others giving near-native typographic quality

pattern: Frosted glass navigation
implementation: nav { backdrop-filter: saturate(180%) blur(20px); background: rgba(255 255 255 / 0.72); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0 0 0 / 0.1); position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 100; }
anti_pattern: Opaque solid background on navigation bar
notes: Apple's signature frosted glass nav replicates material translucency on the web

pattern: Apple spacing scale CSS variables
implementation: :root { --space-xs: 4px; --space-sm: 8px; --space-md: 16px; --space-lg: 24px; --space-xl: 32px; --space-2xl: 40px; --space-3xl: 48px; --space-4xl: 64px; }
anti_pattern: Ad-hoc margin/padding values without a defined scale
notes: Consistent spatial rhythm derived from Apple's 8pt grid

pattern: 44px minimum touch targets on interactive elements
implementation: button a [role='button'] { min-height: 44px; min-width: 44px; touch-action: manipulation; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }
anti_pattern: Small icon-only buttons without sufficient padding
notes: Meets Apple HIG minimum tap target; touch-action: manipulation removes 300ms delay

pattern: prefers-color-scheme for system dark mode
implementation: @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { :root { --color-bg: #000000; --color-text-primary: #f5f5f7; --color-text-secondary: #a1a1a6; } }
anti_pattern: JavaScript-only dark mode toggle that ignores system preference
notes: System-level dark mode without JS dependency prevents flash of wrong theme

pattern: prefers-reduced-motion in Vue transitions
implementation: @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .slide-up-enter-active .slide-up-leave-active { transition-duration: 0.01ms !important; } }
anti_pattern: No animation preference handling in Vue transition styles
notes: Respects iOS Reduce Motion accessibility setting for users with vestibular disorders

pattern: Vue TransitionGroup for list animations
implementation:
• {{ item.name }}
    •
anti_pattern: Abrupt DOM insertions or removals without transition
notes: Spring-timed list mutations match UIKit's animated table view updates

pattern: Scoped styles with Apple semantic color tokens
implementation: <style scoped> .card { background: var(--color-surface); color: var(--color-text-primary); border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid var(--color-separator); } </style>
anti_pattern: Hardcoded hex colors in scoped styles blocking theme switching
notes: Semantic token variables flip automatically between light and dark via :root

pattern: v-if and v-show for progressive disclosure
implementation: {{ details }}
anti_pattern: Revealing all content at once without progressive disclosure
notes: Mirrors Apple's pattern of hiding complexity behind user-initiated reveals

pattern: Custom v-intersect directive for scroll reveals
implementation: app.directive('intersect' { mounted(el handler) { const obs = new IntersectionObserver(([e]) => { if (e.isIntersecting) { el.classList.add('revealed'); obs.disconnect(); } } { threshold: 0.1 }); obs.observe(el); } }); // Usage: <section v-intersect>
anti_pattern: Scroll event listeners for visibility detection
notes: Performant off-main-thread visibility detection matching Apple.com's scroll animations

pattern: Custom v-haptic directive stub for Capacitor/Ionic
implementation: app.directive('haptic' { mounted(el) { el.addEventListener('click' async () => { if (window.Capacitor?.isNativePlatform()) { const { Haptics ImpactStyle } = await import('@capacitor/haptics'); await Haptics.impact({ style: ImpactStyle.Medium }); } }); } }); // Usage: <button v-haptic>
anti_pattern: No haptic feedback on native-feeling interactive elements
notes: On web is a no-op; on Capacitor wraps native UIImpactFeedbackGenerator for real haptics

pattern: Inter font via @font-face with Apple-matched metrics
implementation: @font-face { font-family: 'Inter'; src: url('/fonts/Inter.var.woff2') format('woff2'); font-weight: 100 900; font-display: swap; } body { font-family: 'Inter' -apple-system BlinkMacSystemFont system-ui sans-serif; }
anti_pattern: Loading Inter from CDN link tag causing layout shift
notes: Self-hosted variable Inter with font-display: swap eliminates FOIT and layout shift
